MAJOR_findings_discharged_in_followup_sl.MAJOR_1_transitive_imports: discharged via task_2026-04-26_g10_helper_extraction (commit pending) — _is_missing_local_hour moved to src.contracts.dst_semantics; daily_obs_append + hourly_instants_append re-pointed; subprocess-isolated transitive audit added.
MAJOR_findings_discharged_in_followup_sl.MAJOR_2_direct_invocation_broken: discharged via same followup slice — sys.path.insert shim added to all 5 ticks; substring-grep antibody added.

isolation_contract_enforcement.enforcement_mechanism: AST-walk via tests/test_ingest_isolation.py::test_no_forbidden_imports_in_ingest. Regex-first scan would miss `from src.signal.diurnal import x` masquerading as substring; AST is precise.

empirical_smoke_test.scope: Import-only — each tick's main() callable was imported via venv to confirm the dependency chain resolves.
empirical_smoke_test.did_not_execute: Ticks were NOT run against production DB — that is an operator-controlled action. The slice ships the lane structure + antibody + import-validity proof, not runtime execution proof.

departures_from_pattern.skipped_red_commit: RED phase intentionally skipped — this slice is structural decoupling + antibody. A tick with a forbidden import would be a bug, not a meaningful RED. The antibody catches mistakes pre-commit on any future addition.
departures_from_pattern.did_not_remove_main_py_ticks: G10-cutover (Wave 2). Cannot remove the bundled tick functions until launchd plists are in place + at least one cycle proves scheduled execution works.

followups_owed.summary: Remove _k2_*_tick + _ecmwf_open_data_cycle from src/main.py scheduler. Requires operator decision + launchd plists + at least one cycle proof.
followups_owed.gating: Operator decision + launchd plists deployed + cycle proof

followups_owed.summary: Workbook G10 enumeration lists 8 finer-grained ticks (wu_icao_tick, ogimet_tick, openmeteo_hourly_tick, openmeteo_solar_tick, forecasts_tick, ecmwf_open_ens_tick, hko_tick, hole_scan_tick). Requires refactoring src/data/daily_obs_append.daily_tick to accept a source filter.
8 launchd plist files for the ingest tick scripts. Operator deploy concern.
Standalone ECMWF open-data cycle tick (paralleling _ecmwf_open_data_cycle in src/main.py). Separate cadence (cycle-based, not tick-based).

lore_extraction_recommendation: If a future contract needs to widen FORBIDDEN_IMPORT_PREFIXES (e.g., add src.calibration or remove src.observability), extract the rationale into a lore card. Today's set matches the workbook G10 acceptance verbatim.
